name: zabbix
label: Zabbix
description: Zabbix is an open-source enterprise-level monitoring platform that provides real-time visibility into the performance and availability of IT infrastructure — including servers, networks, applications, services, and cloud environments.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.name: server_url
fields.description: Provide the host URL of the zabbix server to connect and perform automated operations.
fields.tooltip: Provide the host URL of the zabbix server to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: Authentication Type
fields.name: auth_type
fields.description: Select the authentication mechanism supported by the Zabbix Server REST API. Note that Basic Authentication is only supported in versions earlier than 7.0, while API Key authentication is supported in version 7.2 and later.
fields.tooltip: Select the authentication mechanism supported by the Zabbix Server REST API. Note that Basic Authentication is only supported in versions earlier than 7.0, while API Key authentication is supported in version 7.2 and later.

Basic Auth.title: Authentication Method
Basic Auth.name: auth_method
Basic Auth.description: Select the authentication method to access the Zabbix REST API endpoints. The user can choose either Client Credentials or an Auth Token
Basic Auth.tooltip: Select the authentication method to access the Zabbix REST API endpoints. The user can choose either Client Credentials or an Auth Token

Client Credentials.title: Username
Client Credentials.name: username
Client Credentials.description: Username of the Zabbix server to which you will connect and perform automated operations.
Client Credentials.tooltip: Username of the Zabbix server to which you will connect and perform automated operations.

Client Credentials.title: Password
Client Credentials.name: password
Client Credentials.description: Password of the Zabbix server to which you will connect and perform automated operations.
Client Credentials.tooltip: Password of the Zabbix server to which you will connect and perform automated operations.

Auth Token.title: Auth Token
Auth Token.name: auth_token
Auth Token.description: Specify the authentication token of the Zabbix rest api server to which you will connect and perform automated operations.
Auth Token.tooltip: Specify the authentication token of the Zabbix rest api server to which you will connect and perform automated operations.

API Key.title: API Key
API Key.name: api_key
API Key.description: Provide the API key of the zabbix server used to authenticate and perform automated operations.
API Key.tooltip: Provide the API key of the zabbix server used to authenticate and perform automated operations.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for for the server is to be verified or not. By default, this option is set as True.

operations.title: Get Alerts
operations.description: Retrieves alert records from the Zabbix monitoring system including details such as recipient, media type, status, and message content.

parameters.title: Start Date
parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Specify the start date to retrieve alerts that were generated after the given time.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the start date to retrieve alerts that were generated after the given time.

parameters.title: End Date
parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Specify the end date to retrieve alerts that were generated before the given time.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the end date to retrieve alerts that were generated before the given time.

parameters.title: Alert IDs
parameters.name: alert_ids
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts with the given IDs.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts with the given IDs.

parameters.title: Action IDs
parameters.name: action_ids
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by the given actions.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by the given actions.

parameters.title: Event IDs
parameters.name: event_ids
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by the given events.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by the given events.

parameters.title: Group IDs
parameters.name: group_ids
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by objects from the given host groups.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by objects from the given host groups.

parameters.title: Host IDs
parameters.name: host_ids
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by objects from the given hosts.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by objects from the given hosts.

parameters.title: User IDs
parameters.name: user_ids
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns only message alerts that were sent to the given users.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter  only message alerts that were sent to the given users.

parameters.title: Object IDs
parameters.name: object_ids
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns only alerts generated by the given objects
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter only alerts generated by the given objects

parameters.title: Event Object Type
parameters.name: event_object_type
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by events related to objects of the given type.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by events related to objects of the given type.

parameters.title: Event Source
parameters.name: event_source
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by events related to objects of the given type.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by events related to objects of the given type.
options: Event Created by a Discovery Rule
Event Created by Active Agent Auto Registration
Event Created on Service Status Update

parameters.title: Sort Fields
parameters.name: sort_field
parameters.description: Sort the result by the given properties. Possible values are: alertid, clock, eventid, mediatypeid, sendto and status.
parameters.tooltip: Sort the result by the given properties. Possible values are: alertid, clock, eventid, mediatypeid, sendto and status.

parameters.title: Sort Order
parameters.name: sortorder
parameters.description: Order of sorting. If an array is passed, each value will be matched to the corresponding property given in the sortfield parameter.
parameters.tooltip: Order of sorting. If an array is passed, each value will be matched to the corresponding property given in the sortfield parameter.

parameters.title: Limit
parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of records to be returned in the action response.
parameters.tooltip: Limit the number of records to be returned in the action response.

parameters.title: Search Pattern
parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Return results that match the given pattern (case-insensitive). Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are strings to search for. If no additional options are given, this will perform a LIKE "%…%" search. {"subject": "*CPU*","message": "*high*"}
parameters.tooltip: Return only those results that exactly match the given filter. Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are strings to search for. If no additional options are given, this will perform a LIKE "%…%" search. ex. {"subject": "*CPU*","message": "*high*"}

parameters.title: Search By Any
parameters.name: search_any
parameters.description: If set to true, return results that match any of the criteria given in the filter or search parameter instead of all of them. Default: false
parameters.tooltip: If set to true, return results that match any of the criteria given in the filter or search parameter instead of all of them. Default: false

parameters.title: Search Wildcards Enabled
parameters.name: search_wildcards_enabled
parameters.description: If set to true, enables the use of "*" as a wildcard character in the search parameter.
parameters.tooltip: If set to true, enables the use of "*" as a wildcard character in the search parameter.

parameters.title: Filter
parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Return only those results that exactly match the given filter. Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are either a single value or an array of values to match against. ex. {"status": 0 }
parameters.tooltip: Return only those results that exactly match the given filter. Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are either a single value or an array of values to match against. ex. {"status": 0 }

parameters.title: Additional Fields
parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.description: Provide additional parameters in JSON format to filter the alerts based on the provided input.
parameters.tooltip: Provide additional parameters in JSON format to filter the alerts based on the provided input.

operations.title: Get Events
operations.description: Retrieves event data from the Zabbix server based on specified filters such as event type, severity, source, and time range.

parameters.title: Start Date
parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Specify the start date to retrieve only events that were created at or after the given time.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the start date to retrieve only events that were created at or after the given time.

parameters.title: End Date
parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Specify the end date to retrieve only events that have been created before or at the given time.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the end date to retrieve only events that have been created before or at the given time.

parameters.title: Event IDs
parameters.name: event_ids
parameters.description: Provide a CSV list of event IDs to return only the events with the specified IDs.
parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of event IDs to return only the events with the specified IDs.

parameters.title: Group IDs
parameters.name: group_ids
parameters.description: Provide a CSV list of host group IDs to return only the events with the specified IDs.
parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of host group IDs to return only the events with the specified IDs.

parameters.title: Host IDs
parameters.name: host_ids
parameters.description: Provide a CSV list of host IDs to return only events created by objects that belong to the given hosts.
parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of host IDs to return only events created by objects that belong to the given hosts.

parameters.title: Object IDs
parameters.name: object_ids
parameters.description: Provide a CSV list of object IDs to return only events created by the given objects.
parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of object IDs to return only events created by the given objects.

parameters.title: Event Object Type
parameters.name: event_object_type
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by events related to objects of the given type.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by events related to objects of the given type.

parameters.title: Event Source
parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns events with the given type.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns events with the given type.
options: Event Created by a Discovery Rule
Event Created by Active Agent Auto Registration

parameters.title: Acknowledged
parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: If set to true return only acknowledged events.
parameters.tooltip: If set to true return only acknowledged events.

parameters.title: Suppressed
parameters.name: suppressed
parameters.description: If set to true - return only suppressed events; false - return events in the normal state.
parameters.tooltip: If set to true - return only suppressed events; false - return events in the normal state.

parameters.title: Severities
parameters.name: severities
parameters.description: Return only events with given event severities. Applies only if object is trigger.
parameters.tooltip: Return only events with given event severities. Applies only if object is trigger.

parameters.title: Start Event ID
parameters.name: event_id_from
parameters.description: Return only events with IDs greater or equal to the given ID.
parameters.tooltip: Return only events with IDs greater or equal to the given ID.

parameters.title: End Event ID
parameters.name: event_id_till
parameters.description: Return only events with IDs less or equal to the given ID.
parameters.tooltip: Return only events with IDs less or equal to the given ID.

parameters.title: Sort Fields
parameters.name: sort_field
parameters.description: Sort the result by the given properties. Possible values are: eventid, objectid and clock.
parameters.tooltip: Sort the result by the given properties. Possible values are: eventid, objectid and clock.

parameters.title: Sort Order
parameters.name: sortorder
parameters.description: Order of sorting. If an array is passed, each value will be matched to the corresponding property given in the sortfield parameter.
parameters.tooltip: Order of sorting. If an array is passed, each value will be matched to the corresponding property given in the sortfield parameter.

parameters.title: Limit
parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of records to be returned in the action response.
parameters.tooltip: Limit the number of records to be returned in the action response.

parameters.title: Search Pattern
parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Return results that match the given pattern (case-insensitive). Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are strings to search for. If no additional options are given, this will perform a LIKE "%…%" search. ex. {"name": "CPU"}
parameters.tooltip: Return only those results that exactly match the given filter. Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are strings to search for. If no additional options are given, this will perform a LIKE "%…%" search. ex. {"name": "CPU"}

parameters.title: Filter
parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Return only those results that exactly match the given filter. Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are either a single value or an array of values to match against. {"value": 1,"acknowledged": 0}
parameters.tooltip: Return only those results that exactly match the given filter. Provides a filter object in JSON format with key-value pairs, where the keys are property names and the values are either a single value or an array of values to match against. {"value": 1,"acknowledged": 0}

parameters.title: Additional Fields
parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.description: Provide additional parameters in JSON format to filter the events based on the provided input.
parameters.tooltip: Provide additional parameters in JSON format to filter the events based on the provided input.

operations.title: Get Problems
operations.description: Retrieves active problem records from the Zabbix server, representing currently unresolved issues.

parameters.title: Start Date
parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Specify the start date to retrieve only problems that have been created after or at the given time.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the start date to retrieve only problems that have been created after or at the given time.

parameters.title: End Date
parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Specify the end date to retrieve only problems that have been created before or at the given time.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the end date to retrieve only problems that have been created before or at the given time.

parameters.title: Fetch Related Alerts
parameters.name: fetch_alert
parameters.description: Selecting this option to retrieve problem-related alerts from the Zabbix server.
parameters.tooltip: Selecting this option to retrieve problem-related alerts from the Zabbix server.

parameters.title: Severities
parameters.name: severities
parameters.description: Return only problems with given event severities. Applies only if object is trigger.
parameters.tooltip: Return only problems with given event severities. Applies only if object is trigger.

parameters.title: Event IDs
parameters.name: event_ids
parameters.description: Provide a CSV list of event IDs to return only problems with the given IDs.
parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of event IDs to return only problems with the given IDs.

parameters.title: Group IDs
parameters.name: group_ids

parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of host group IDs to return only problems created by objects that belong to the given host groups.

parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of host IDs to return only problems created by objects that belong to the given hosts.

parameters.title: Object IDs

parameters.tooltip: Provide a CSV list of object IDs to only problems created by the given objects.

parameters.title: Event Object Type
parameters.name: object

parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns alerts generated by events related to objects of the given type.

parameters.title: Event Source
parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Specifying this parameter returns events with the given type.
parameters.tooltip: Specifying this parameter returns events with the given type.

operations.title: Execute Generic JSON RPC Request
operations.description: Execute any Zabbix JSON RPC call based on the provided request body parameters.

parameters.title: Request Body
parameters.name: request_body
parameters.description: Specify the JSON-RPC request body to execute and retrieve the response. Note: Do not include the auth key and value in the request body, as it is internally handled by the code. for more info please refer this https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/5.0/en/manual/api/reference/host/get link
parameters.tooltip: Specify the JSON-RPC request body to execute and retrieve the response. Note: Do not include the auth key and value in the request body, as it is internally handled by the code. for more info please refer this https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/5.0/en/manual/api/reference/host/get link
